clientToken.description: Your FeedAd client token. Check your FeedAd admin panel.

placementId.description: A FeedAd placement ID of your choice

decoration.description: A decoration to apply to the ad slot. See our [documentation](https://docs.feedad.com/web/feed_ad/#decorations)

sdkOptions.description: Only required if you are using Prebid.JS in an app environment (aka hybrid App). See our [documentation](https://docs.feedad.com/web/configuration/#hybrid-app-config-parameters)
